unexpected_finds.finding: V_quad Borel-channel gate FAILED at K-scan; the standard 1/n asymptotic series for log|delta_n| has NO finite-radius Borel-plane singularity.  This contradicts the 'channel structurally captures V_quad's P-III' working assumption from the task framing.
unexpected_finds.implication: Either (a) Conjecture A part (iv) needs revision to specify a different channel, or (b) the relevant Borel singularities are at infinity in the zeta-plane and require a different resummation scheme (e.g., Borel-Leroy in zeta^{1/2} or the connection-coefficient channel of the underlying difference equation).

unexpected_finds.finding: EXACT analytic match of trans-series leading exponents (A, alpha) for ALL 6 families.
unexpected_finds.evidence: A_obs and alpha_obs match closed-form WKB predictions A_pred = 4 (for a_n constant) or 3 (for a_n linear); alpha_pred = A - 2 log(c_b) + log|c_a|; matches to 12+ digits for all 6 families.
unexpected_finds.implication: The leading WKB structure of degree-2 PCFs is FULLY DETERMINED by (deg(a_n), c_a, c_b).  A 3-row classification by (A_obs, alpha_obs, beta_obs) is a clean structural invariant -- this is a publishable observation independent of the (failed) Borel-Painleve fit attempt.

unexpected_finds.finding: Two MARGINAL Painleve fits at K=12: QL15 -> P-V (9.1e-5) and QL26 -> P-III (2.8e-5).
unexpected_finds.evidence: Below the 1e-4 MARGINAL threshold, but K-extension diagnosis on V_quad shows these are Pade-truncation noise.  Recommended dismissal as artefacts unless QL15/QL26 K-scan can be done in a follow-up session and shows monotone residual decay.
